name: Strawberry/Pineapple Tarts in Cereal-Mallow Shells
recipeInstructions:
Strawberry/Pineapple Tarts
1 1/2 cups diced strawberries
1/4 cup sugar
3 tablespoons cornstarch
3/4 cup pineapple juice
1 cup diced pineapple
1/8 teaspoon salt
1 teaspoon butter
6 baked tart shells
vanilla ice cream
Shells: Melt marshmallows with milk over simmering water, stirring until smooth. Add to cereal and toss to mix evenly. Press into the bottoms and sides of 6 small, buttered tart pans. Cool completely.
Tarts: Mix strawberries and sugar in a bowl. Make a smooth paste by whisking cornstarch with a little pineapple juice. Gradually add remaining pineapple juice, diced pineapple, and salt. Cook, stirring constantly until thickened. Add butter, strawberries, and additional sugar if desired. Allow to cool slightly before filling into shells. Serve topped with vanilla ice cream.
Tootie's Notes: You can use chocolate ice cream or orange-flavored ice instead of vanilla ice cream.
